description: Delivered 5+ end-to-end web projects for clients across digital marketing, dental, and education sectors. Built custom WordPress themes and plugins, developed full-stack applications using Next.js, Supabase, Prisma, and PostgreSQL, and handled complete project lifecycles from requirements gathering to deployment.

Contributed to major projects CDO (Computer Degrees Online) and FOC (Find Our College) by collecting and organizing US college data, building high-quality backlinks, and collaborating with the digital marketing team to optimize landing pages and improve user engagement.

Designed and developed dynamic, responsive web applications using the MERN stack, implemented REST APIs, handled user authentication and CRUD operations, and delivered functional features in an agile environment.
